libraries.name: GSAP
libraries.purpose: Spring-bounce motion language, scroll reveals, fizz particle animation, elastic toggle animation

libraries.name: Canvas Confetti
libraries.purpose: Micro-feedback celebration bursts on task completion and save actions

libraries.name: Phosphor Icons
libraries.purpose: Icon system for navigation dock, section headers, and entity indicators

antiRepeatCompliance: Uses powder blue + cherry red on cream (not pink+mint neon from Pass 1)
Uses floating bottom dock navigation (not jukebox selector from Pass 1)
Uses awning stripes and recipe-card shapes (not googie boomerangs from Pass 2)
Uses light cheerful soda shop palette (not dark purple cinema from Pass 3)
Uses receipt-roll and fizz-bubble transitions (not film-reel from Pass 3)
Uses handwritten napkin-note chat (not comic panel chat from Pass 3)
